mapper.insert: INSERT INTO income_category (user_id, family_group_id, name, description, is_built_in, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{familyGroupId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{isBuiltIn}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM income_category WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM income_category WHERE family_group_id = #{familyGroupId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM income_category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_built_in = 0
DELETE FROM income_category WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND family_group_id = #{familyGroupId}
mapper.update: UPDATE income_category SET family_group_id = 0, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND family_group_id = #{familyGroupId} AND is_built_in = 0
UPDATE income_category SET family_group_id = #{familyGroupId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_built_in = 0
